This build focuses on local mod, save, a: This build focuses on local mod, save, and settings workflows.
- Mod Management combines install, unins: - Mod Management combines install, uninstall, and detail inspection.
- Save Management shows vanilla and modd: - Save Management shows vanilla and modded slots together.
- Copy saves now picks the destination s: - Copy saves now picks the destination slot in a dedicated popup.
- Settings still manages game-path detec: - Settings still manages game-path detection and .bak cleanup.
